name: _template
title: <Domain title, e.g. 'Clinical Documentation'>
description: <one line: what this pack produces and the failure mode it guards against>

stages.label: Frame
stages.purpose: Define the subject, the decision/output needed, and the constraints.

stages.label: Plan
stages.purpose: Decide the structure and approach before producing — the plan the draft must follow.

stages.label: Produce
stages.purpose: Write the deliverable; every claim/figure traceable to the plan and a source.

stages.label: Review breadth
stages.purpose: Scan every section for completeness and internal consistency.

stages.label: Review depth
stages.purpose: Issue a verdict on each gate.

gates.name: <Gate 1 name>
gates.question: <the question this gate forces an explicit answer to>
